title: ChatGPT 101 - Supercharge Your Work & Life with ChatGPT
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!
A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

In this course, you will explore the practical applications of ChatGPT in both your personal and professional life. You'll understand how to leverage ChatGPT's capabilities to enhance productivity, creativity, and decision-making. Through engaging lessons and exercises, you’ll learn how to effectively interact with ChatGPT, draft powerful prompts, and apply advanced techniques to get the most out of this AI tool.

The course begins with an introduction to ChatGPT, its strengths and limitations, and how to use it responsibly. You will learn how to phrase questions effectively, verify information, and overcome common challenges. As you progress, you’ll explore the nuances of advanced prompt engineering, including follow-up prompts, expert personas, and audience tailoring. You'll also discover ways to integrate ChatGPT into different work scenarios, such as job applications, professional communication, and content creation.

Whether you're a professional looking to enhance your workflow or a learner eager to boost your productivity, this course is designed to equip you with valuable skills. No prior knowledge of AI or ChatGPT is required. The course is suitable for anyone looking to improve their efficiency and creativity through AI-powered tools.

By the end of the course, you will be able to create effective prompts, apply advanced techniques for tailored responses, integrate ChatGPT into your professional and personal life, and use AI to supercharge your work and creative projects.
